General.Name: Sling Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Sling Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs and sells women's handbags, small leather goods, luggage, and travel goods in the People's Republic of China. The company offers handle bags, clutch bags, wallets, coin cases, card holders, and suitcases. It also engages in the wholesale, retail, and export of clothes, luggage, wallets, and accessories, as well as designs, markets, sources, and procures women's handbags, and small leather and travel goods. The company offers its products under the ELLE and Jessie & Jane brands. The company sells its products through a chain of self-operated retail points and third-party online retail platforms. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. Sling Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Yen Sheng Investment Limited.
General.Address: Yen Sheng Centre, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
